html:
2026-0228
2026-03-13ISEDSocial Sciences and Humanities Research Council ActAppointment of the interim President of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, on a part-time basisAppointment of Normand Labrie of Toronto, Ontario, to be interim President of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, on a part-time basis, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year, or until such time as a new President is appointed, whichever occurs first; and effective at the end of the said term, the continuation of his status as a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council until July 6, 2027.N/A
act: Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council Act
subject: Appointment of the interim President of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, on a part-time basis
precis: Appointment of Normand Labrie of Toronto, Ontario, to be interim President of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, on a part-time basis, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year, or until such time as a new President is appointed, whichever occurs first; and effective at the end of the said term, the continuation of his status as a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council until July 6, 2027.
